case_title: PERLA REINHARTZ VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A POLITICAL et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER.
